Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class SharedStateStore

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Thread-safe shared state store with last-writer-wins (LWW) conflict resolution. Each entry tracks a timestamp; stale writes are silently ignored.

public sealed class SharedStateStore : ISharedStateStore
Inheritance
object
SharedStateStore
Implements
ISharedStateStore
